meta.title: Runway to ROI
meta.description: Tell us your stage, the outcome you need next, and the budget allocated for this phase. We'll calculate the leanest team, compensation bands, and capital split to move that goal forward.

form.systemPrompt: PLACEHOLDER: You are an expert hiring planner. Given the user's status, budget, and goal, output a lean roadmap.

rows.name: goal
rows.label: Primary Goal
rows.placeholder: Goal (e.g. Expand to a new market)

drawer.title: Unlock Your Hiring Roadmap
drawer.description: Enter your work email to reveal your leanest team setup and capital split.

cards.title: Data-Driven Forecasting
cards.description: Stop guessing your hiring needs. Our planner uses historical data and industry benchmarks to accurately predict time-to-hire, costs, and candidate pipeline requirements.

cards.title: Save Time
cards.description: Cut planning cycles by weeks. Automate manual spreadsheet calculations and focus on strategy.

cards.title: Fast Execution
cards.description: Deploy plans instantly. Export your headcount strategy seamlessly into your ATS.

cards.title: Align with OKRs
cards.description: Directly tie your headcount planning to business objectives and revenue targets.

steps.title: Define Roles
steps.description: Input your required roles, seniority levels, and target start dates into the planner.

steps.title: Calculate Needs
steps.description: Our AI calculates required pipeline size, budget, and estimated time to hire.

steps.title: Get Result
steps.description: Export the plan or seamlessly integrate it with your ATS to begin sourcing.

faqs.question: What is the Runway-to-ROI Hiring Planner?
faqs.answer: The Runway-to-ROI Hiring Planner helps founders determine who to hire, when to hire, and how to allocate their hiring budget based on their current stage, business goals, and available runway.

faqs.question: How does the Hiring Planner make recommendations?
faqs.answer: Based on your company's stage, available budget, and primary business goal, the planner suggests a lean hiring roadmap, recommended roles, compensation bands, and budget allocation to maximize impact.

faqs.question: Does this tool replace HR or recruitment planning?
faqs.answer: No. The Hiring Planner is designed to support strategic workforce planning, helping you decide what roles to hire before you begin the recruitment process.

faqs.question: How accurate are the recommendations?
faqs.answer: The recommendations are based on proven startup hiring principles, workforce planning strategies, and the information you provide. They are intended to guide decision-making rather than replace business judgment.

faqs.question: Can I use this tool if I'm an early-stage startup?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Whether you're pre-revenue, bootstrapped, or venture-backed, the planner helps you prioritize hires based on your current resources and growth goals.

faqs.question: Will this help me avoid overhiring?
faqs.answer: Yes. One of the planner's primary goals is to help you build the leanest team required to achieve your next milestone while making the most of your available budget.

meta.title: Hiring Playbook Generator
meta.description: Stop guessing. Generate a highly customized, AI-driven hiring strategy tailored specifically for your target role and industry.

form.systemPrompt: PLACEHOLDER: You are an expert hiring manager. Generate a complete playbook for the role...

drawer.title: Your Playbook is Ready
drawer.description: Enter your work email so we can send your custom {seniorityLevel} {specificRole} hiring framework.

cards.title: Standardized Hiring
cards.description: Ensure every candidate is evaluated against the same structured criteria and scorecards.

cards.title: Save Time
cards.description: Generate interview questions and sourcing channels instantly instead of starting from scratch.

cards.title: Better Quality
cards.description: Improve signal-to-noise ratio with proven evaluation frameworks tailored to the specific role.

cards.title: Unbiased Decisions
cards.description: Eliminate gut-feeling hires by defining what success looks like before the interview starts.

steps.title: Define the Role
steps.description: Input the specific role, seniority, and industry context.

steps.title: Generate Blueprint
steps.description: Our AI builds a custom interview plan, scorecard, and question bank.

steps.title: Start Hiring
steps.description: Export the playbook to your ATS and align your interview panel.

faqs.question: What is the Hiring Playbook?
faqs.answer: The Hiring Playbook is an AI-powered planning tool that creates a structured hiring strategy for any role. It helps you define interview stages, evaluation criteria, sourcing channels, interview questions, and hiring recommendations—all tailored to your requirements.

faqs.question: Who is this tool built for?
faqs.answer: The Hiring Playbook is designed for founders, recruiters, hiring managers, HR teams, and growing businesses that want a more structured and repeatable hiring process.

faqs.question: How are the recommendations generated?
faqs.answer: The playbook is created using the information you provide—such as your company stage, industry, role, and seniority—combined with proven hiring frameworks and best practices.

faqs.question: Can I customize the generated playbook?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Think of the playbook as a starting point. You can edit, expand, or adapt it to match your company's hiring philosophy and interview process.

faqs.question: Will this work for any role?
faqs.answer: Yes. Whether you're hiring a software engineer, sales executive, designer, or operations lead, the generator creates relevant interview stages and questions based on the specific function and seniority.
